headline: Is Target (TGT) Now Priced At A Discount After Mixed Multi Year Returns
summary: If you are wondering whether Target's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, you are not alone. This article focuses on what the numbers suggest about value. Target's shares last closed at US$120.08, with returns of 3.1% over 7 days, 9.6% over 30 days, 19.5% year to date, 7.7% over 1 year, and declines of 18.2% and 22.2% across the past 3 and 5 years. Recent headlines have highlighted Target as a key name in US consumer retail, with investors paying close attention to how...
